name: Toasted Pecan-Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 300 degrees.
In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt with a wire whisk and set aside.
In a large bowl, blend brown sugar and white sugar with an electric mixer until smooth.
Add butter and mix to form a grainy paste, scraping down the sides of the bowl.
Add eggs and vanilla extract and beat until light and fluffy.
Gradually add flour mixture and chocolate chips, mixing at low speed until just combined. Do not overmix.
Stir in pecans.
Scoop dough with a rounded tablespoon onto an ungreased cookie sheet, spacing cookies 2 inches apart.
Bake for 22-24 minutes or until golden brown. Transfer cookies immediately to a cool surface.
